tools.description: Annotate a file or node by adding a key-value property
tools.name: ares_annotate

tools.description: Returns a high-level architectural overview of the repository
tools.name: ares_architecture

tools.description: Repository Conversation Engine. Ask any question about the codebase.
tools.name: ares_chat

tools.description: Compares two files: shared dependencies, shared decisions, coupling score
tools.name: ares_compare

tools.description: Evaluates the compliance of a specific entity against active governance policies
tools.name: ares_compliance

tools.description: Correct a node's properties manually
tools.name: ares_correct

tools.description: Calculates the coverage of requirements for a project
tools.name: ares_coverage

tools.description: Retrieves the comprehensive repository overview dashboard
tools.name: ares_dashboard

tools.description: Returns architectural decisions, optionally filtered by file path or date
tools.name: ares_decisions

tools.description: Evaluates structural drift for a given file
tools.name: ares_drift

tools.description: Ends the current agent session and persists it to the database
tools.name: ares_end_session

tools.description: Retrieves the evolutionary timeline of an entity
tools.name: ares_evolution

tools.description: Evaluates knowledge gaps in the traceability graph
tools.name: ares_gaps

tools.description: Retrieves full metadata for a specific node
tools.name: ares_graph_metadata

tools.description: Expands a node by fetching its immediate neighbors
tools.name: ares_graph_neighbors

tools.description: Retrieves the root node of the graph to start lazy loading
tools.name: ares_graph_root

tools.description: Searches the graph for nodes matching the query
tools.name: ares_graph_search

tools.description: Finds the shortest dependency path between two nodes
tools.name: ares_graph_shortest_path

tools.description: Retrieves statistics about the knowledge graph
tools.name: ares_graph_statistics

tools.description: Scans the repository memory graph for gaps (code without decisions, stale decisions, missing ownership) and returns a health score
tools.name: ares_health_check

tools.description: Performs read-only dependency analysis to determine what downstream components break if this entity is modified. Use this for general blast-radius queries without mutating the graph.
tools.name: ares_impact

tools.description: Record an architectural decision and link it to impacted files
tools.name: ares_record_decision

tools.description: Record a business or technical requirement and link it to files
tools.name: ares_record_requirement

tools.description: Returns requirements linked to the repository or a specific file
tools.name: ares_requirements

tools.description: Retrieves the governance scorecard for a project
tools.name: ares_scorecard

tools.description: Searches nodes by label or file path using full-text matching
tools.name: ares_search

tools.description: Returns summaries of the last 3 agent sessions for continuity
tools.name: ares_session_context

tools.description: Performs mutation analysis only. Simulates structural changes (e.g., removing a node) to project coverage drops, new gaps, and drift before they happen.
tools.name: ares_simulate

tools.description: Returns the chronological commit history for a file
tools.name: ares_timeline

tools.description: Evaluates traceability relationships upstream and downstream
tools.name: ares_traceability

tools.description: Returns the registered owner and contributor history for a file
tools.name: ares_who_owns

tools.description: Explains why a specific entity exists in the ARES memory graph
tools.name: ares_why_exists

tools.description: Bookmark a node or query in the workspace
tools.name: ares_workspace_bookmark

tools.description: List recent questions, bookmarks, and pins
tools.name: ares_workspace_list

tools.description: Navigate back or forward
tools.name: ares_workspace_navigate

tools.description: Pin a node in the workspace
tools.name: ares_workspace_pin

tools.description: Record a navigation event
tools.name: ares_workspace_record_navigation
